FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABL_APPLS_ALL AS STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABL_APPLS_ALL,
 (
 select RECEIVABLE_APPLICATION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABL_APPLS_ALL
 minus
 select RECEIVABLE_APPLICATION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CDC_AR_RECEIVABLE_APPLICTS_ALL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.RECEIVABLE_APPLICATION_ID = STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABL_APPLS_ALL.RECEIVABLE_APPLICATION_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABL_APPLS_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$GGACML.CDC_AR_RECEIVABLE_APPLN_ALL)
